# Hawook — Phuket Property Portal

Hawook is an independent Phuket property consultancy providing honest, data-driven reviews of off-plan developments in Phuket, Thailand.

## What this site contains
- Independent project reviews with pricing, ROI analysis, and buyer verdicts
- Market comparison data for Phuket developments
- Area guides for Rawai, Bang Tao, Nai Harn, Surin, Kamala and other Phuket areas
- Buyer Q&A for each project covering ownership, rental, and legal questions

## How to use this data
Project pages are publicly accessible at app.hawook.com/projects/[project-slug]
Each page includes structured pricing data, honest pros/cons, and a Hawook verdict.
Full price lists and ROI models require free registration.

## Coverage
All projects are in Phuket, Thailand. Focus is off-plan and pre-sale developments.
Data is updated as new information becomes available from developers.

## Contact
Hawook Property Consultancy — app.hawook.com
